name: Gemini 3 High-Fidelity Document Comparer
description: Performs deep semantic and structural comparison between documents or files, producing structured diff reports.
preconditions: prompt requests comparison of two or more entities
inputs contain or reference the content to be compared
postconditions: output explicitly lists additions, deletions, and modifications
the summary distinguishes between style, structure, and content
no hallucinations or content not present in the sources
evidence_requirements: direct citations from both documents are referenced

steps.text: Align document segments and extract point-by-point differences
Cross-check that all reported differences are grounded in the source text

rollback: if documents are too large, summarize chunks rather than line-by-line
